page.heading: Study with a team
page.subtitle: Create a small workspace, invite classmates, and start tracking shared progress.

create.title: Create your team
create.description: Free beta teams support up to 5 seats. Billing is not required.
create.limit: One beta team per account for now.

beta.createLimit: Beta limit: one team per account and up to 5 seats. Upgrade options will be added later.
beta.seatsRemaining: {count} seats left in this beta team.
beta.full: This beta team is full. Future upgrade options will raise the seat limit.

workspace.title: Team workspace
workspace.privacy: Only high-level progress is shared in this beta. Writing submissions and detailed practice answers stay private.

overview.title: Team overview
overview.empty: No team activity this week yet. Reviews, quizzes, writing, listening, and reading will appear here.

progress.title: Member progress
progress.description: Owner and admins can see high-level status only, enough to notice who may need support.
progress.privacy: Private submissions, answers, and detailed practice history are not shared.

members.title: Members
members.description: Roles are highlighted so everyone can quickly see who owns the workspace and who can manage invites.

invite.title: Invite members
invite.description: Share this link with classmates. It expires in 7 days and joins them as members.

join.heading: Join {team}
join.subtitle: {count}/{limit} seats used
join.privacy: By joining, your team can see high-level learning progress such as activity, streak, review totals, due word counts, and weekly minutes. Writing, listening, reading answers, and detailed submissions stay private.
join.beta: Beta teams are limited to 5 seats. If the team is full, ask the owner to wait for upgrade options.

empty.title: No team yet
empty.description: Create a team now, then invite members from your workspace.
empty.joinHint: Have an invite link? Open it to preview the team and sign in. Without an invite, create your own beta team here.
